settings.hero_subheading: KIC is a 3rd-generation family-owned Korean manufacturer of Polypropylene (PP) strapping and HDPE tying tape — trusted by global B2B buyers in 20+ countries.

settings.heading: 3rd Generation Korean PP Strapping Manufacturer
settings.subheading: Since 1973, KIC has been crafting world-class industrial strapping solutions trusted by leading manufacturers and distributors worldwide.
settings.body_text:
KIC (Korea Industrial Company) is a family-owned manufacturer based in Gimpo, Gyeonggi-do, Korea. Founded in 1973 and now operated by its third generation, we bring over 50 years of expertise to every roll of strapping we produce.

We export to 20+ countries worldwide, serving clients in logistics, agriculture, steel, paper, textile, and wood industries. Our ISO 9001:2015-certified facility ensures consistent quality across every batch.

settings.text: 50+ years of PP strapping manufacturing expertise

settings.heading: Industrial PP Strapping Solutions
settings.subheading: All pricing is RFQ-based. Contact us for competitive wholesale quotes tailored to your volume and specifications.

settings.heading: Industries We Serve
settings.subheading: KIC PP strapping solutions are trusted across diverse industries worldwide — from logistics hubs to agricultural farms.

settings.title: Logistics & Warehousing
settings.description: Secure pallet bundling and high-speed automated strapping for global distribution centers.

settings.title: Agriculture
settings.description: Durable baling and bundling for hay, straw, and agricultural produce.

settings.title: Steel & Metal
settings.description: Heavy-duty high-tension PP strapping for coiled steel, rods, and structural materials.

settings.title: Paper & Printing
settings.description: Reliable strapping for reams, rolls, and finished paper product bundles.

settings.title: Textile
settings.description: Gentle yet strong bundling solutions for fabric rolls and garment packages.

settings.title: Wood & Lumber
settings.description: Tough weather-resistant PP strapping for timber, plywood, and panel materials.

settings.heading: The KIC Advantage
settings.subheading: What sets KIC apart from other strapping suppliers? Here's why thousands of global buyers trust us.

settings.title: Superior Breaking Strength
settings.description: Higher breaking strength than similar straps — engineered with Korean virgin resin for consistent, reliable performance under load.

settings.title: ISO 9001:2015 Certified
settings.description: Our quality management system is internationally certified, ensuring every roll meets strict specifications from start to finish.

settings.title: Consistent Specification
settings.description: Consistent width, thickness, and breaking strength from the first meter to the last. No camber. No surprises.

settings.title: Custom Color & Print OEM
settings.description: Vivid and unique colored straps with RoHS-certified materials. Custom printed straps with OEM shipping marks available.

settings.title: Eco-Friendly Materials
settings.description: Korean virgin resin leaves fewer residues in your machines and causes less environmental impact than recycled alternatives.

settings.title: 20+ Countries Export Experience
settings.description: Decades of exporting expertise means we understand customs, logistics, and compliance for your destination market.

settings.title: KIC Founded
settings.description: Korea Industrial Company (KIC) was founded by the Shin family in Gimpo, Gyeonggi-do, Korea — beginning production of polypropylene packaging materials.

settings.title: Factory Expansion
settings.description: Significant expansion of manufacturing capacity with new production lines enabling larger-scale domestic supply.

settings.title: First International Exports
settings.description: KIC began exporting PP strapping internationally, establishing footholds in Japan and Southeast Asia.

settings.title: ISO 9001 Certification
settings.description: KIC achieved ISO 9001 quality management certification, formalizing our commitment to consistent product quality.

settings.title: Global Expansion to 10+ Countries
settings.description: KIC's export reach expanded to over 10 countries across Europe, North America, and Oceania.

settings.title: 3rd Generation Leadership
settings.description: The third generation of the Shin family assumed leadership, bringing digital transformation and a renewed focus on global B2B markets.

settings.title: 50th Anniversary — 20+ Countries
settings.description: Celebrating 50 years of manufacturing excellence — now exporting to 20+ countries with state-of-the-art production facilities.

settings.heading: Certifications & Standards
settings.subheading: Every KIC product undergoes rigorous quality testing. Our certifications prove it.

settings.title: ISO 9001:2015
settings.description: Internationally recognized quality management system certification.

settings.title: RoHS Compliant
settings.description: Materials free of restricted hazardous substances — safe for global markets.

settings.title: 100% Recyclable PP
settings.description: All polypropylene strapping is fully recyclable, supporting circular economy practices.

settings.title: Korean Virgin Resin
settings.description: Premium Korean-grade virgin polypropylene for superior strength and fewer machine residues.

settings.heading: Request a Custom Quote
settings.body_text: All KIC products are priced on a Request for Quote (RFQ) basis to ensure you receive the most competitive pricing for your specific volume, grade, and destination.
